options.name: -bottom
options.description: Specifies how far, in microns, to expand the Area I/O cell box in the bottom direction when determining the size of the placement and routing obstructions to be pushed down.

options.name: -insertBuffer
options.description: Specifies either the name of the buffer, or that there are no buffers to be inserted.

options.name: -left
options.description: Specifies how far, in microns, to expand the Area I/O cell box in the left direction when determining the size of the placement and routing obstructions to be pushed down.

options.name: -pinOnBoundary
options.description: Specifies the internal pin created to be placed at the intersection of the hole punch (placement obstruction) and the space reserved for the partition. If it is not specified, the default is that the internal pin is placed directly on top of the area I/O cell.

options.name: -right
options.description: Specifies how far, in microns, to expand the Area I/O cell box in the right direction when determining the size of the placement and routing obstructions to be pushed down.

options.name: -selectedCell
options.description: Specifies hole punches for all currently selected cells that overlap partitions if they are Area I/O cells. If you do not specify this parameter, the command specifies hole punches for all Area I/O cells that overlap partitions.

options.name: -top
options.description: Specifies how far, in microns, to expand the Area I/O cell box in the top direction when determining the size of the placement and routing obstructions to be pushed down.
